# Payxem

> Professional Invoicing & Payments for Freelancers and Businesses

Payxem is a professional invoicing and payment tracking platform built for freelancers, consultants, and small businesses.

It allows users to create invoices, send payment links, and track payments while actual payment processing is handled by third-party providers such as PayPal and Stripe.

Payxem does not operate as a bank or payment processor. It does not hold or custody funds. It acts as a coordination and tracking layer for financial activity.

## Core Features

- Professional invoice creation with line items, tax, and due dates
- Payment links and QR codes for quick payments
- Ledger-based wallet tracking with real-time balance
- Multi-currency support (52+ currencies with live exchange rates)
- Multiple payment methods (PayPal, credit/debit cards, cryptocurrency)
- XEM reward points program
- Identity verification (KYC) for payout eligibility
- Biometric login and PIN lock security

## Target Users

- Freelancers (designers, developers, writers, marketers)
- Remote workers and consultants
- Small businesses and service providers
- Digital professionals in underserved markets

## Regional Focus

The platform is designed especially for underserved markets such as Pakistan, Bangladesh, India, and similar regions where access to global payment systems is limited.

## Pricing

- No monthly fees or setup costs
- Transaction fee: 3.3% + $0.30 per payment received
- Clients can choose to cover the processing fee at checkout
- Free withdrawals (standard processing time)

## Links

- Website: https://payxem.com
- App: https://app.payxem.com
- Terms of Service: https://payxem.com/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://payxem.com/privacy
